Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT baseline."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(baseline.weight) AS units_count, sum(baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * baseline.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__baseline", sum(CASE WHEN (upgrade.applicability = true) THEN upgrade."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" ELSE baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" END * baseline.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__upgrade", sum((coalesce(baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", 0) - coalesce(CASE WHEN (upgrade.applicability = true) THEN upgrade."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" ELSE baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" END, 0)) * baseline.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__savings", sum(baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * baseline.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh__baseline", sum(CASE WHEN (upgrade.applicability = true) THEN upgrade."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" ELSE baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" END * baseline.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh__upgrade", sum((coalesce(baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh", 0) - coalesce(CASE WHEN (upgrade.applicability = true) THEN upgrade."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" ELSE baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" END, 0)) * baseline.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh__savings" 
FROM (SELECT * 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet.upgrade = 0) AS baseline LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet.upgrade != 0) AS upgrade ON baseline.bldg_id = upgrade.bldg_id AND baseline."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" = upgrade."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" AND baseline.state = upgrade.state AND upgrade.upgrade = 1 AND upgrade.applicability = true 
WHERE baseline.applicability = true AND baseline.state IN ('CO', 'NM') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/3addbe1ee19daaf26c9d6e50c41339f063f0f705618dce9ec8acaabd75a9eaef/acbb34c7-bc3c-469b-82c0-e50dee791a27/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
